title: Why Etihad Airways Is The Calmest Gulf Carrier About Boeing's 777X Delays
description: Many airlines around the world have panicked over the delays for the 777X project. But Etihad is very calm.
content: The ongoing industrial crisis unfolding across Boeing assembly lines has sent a ripple of anxiety through the commercial aviation hubs of the Persian Gulf, yet Abu Dhabi-based Etihad Airways remains entirely detached from the panic. Neighboring netwo... [11209 chars]

title: Airbus told to inspect A380 jets after regulators reported cracks in wings
description: Airbus said on Wednesday it was supporting inspections on a subset of A380 aircraft after Europe's aviation regulator ordered urgent checks on the jets’ wing structures.
content:
Airbus said on Wednesday it was supporting inspections on a subset of A380 aircraft after Europe’s aviation regulator ordered urgent checks on the jets’ wing structures.

title: DGCA probes taxiway incident involving Air India and IndiGo aircraft at Ahmedabad airport
description: The incident occurred on June 24 when an Air India Airbus A320, operating flight AI2493 from Mumbai to Ahmedabad, landed on Runway 23 and exited the runway via taxiway
content: The Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) is investigating an incident involving Air India and IndiGo aircraft at Ahmedabad airport after an Air India plane deviated from its assigned taxi route following landing, according to a press note iss... [2198 chars]

title: DGCA probes taxiway incident involving Air India, IndiGo aircraft at Ahmedabad airport
description: DGCA investigates a taxiway incident involving Air India and IndiGo aircraft at Ahmedabad airport after a wrong turn.
content: India’s aviation safety regulator has initiated an investigation into a taxiway incident involving Air India and IndiGo aircraft at Ahmedabad airport on June 24 after an Air India aircraft inadvertently continued on an incorrect taxi route following ... [1977 chars]

title: What caused Air India, IndiGo planes to come face to face at Ahmedabad airport?
description: Air India, in a statement, said its flight inadvertently took a wrong turn during taxiing, adding there was no compromise on the safety of passengers and crew. | India News
content:
A brief taxiway confusion at Ahmedabad airport on Wednesday led to an Air India and an IndiGo aircraft facing each other on the ground. Officials have confirmed that both planes remained at a safe distance and no safety was compromised.
Here’s what a... [2404 chars]

title: Close Call At Ahmedabad Airport: Major Plane Crash Averted After Air India, IndiGo Flights Come Face-To-Face
description: DGCA has launched a probe after Air India flight AI2493 mistakenly continued on taxiway P instead of turning onto G at Ahmedabad Airport, bringing it in front of departing IndiGo 6E-5160 before the crew stopped the aircraft in time.
content: Ahmedabad: A major plane crash was narrowly averted at Ahmedabad’s Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport when an Air India flight veered onto a taxiway already being used by an IndiGo plane preparing for departure. The Directorate General of... [1624 chars]

title: Akasa Air expands domestic footprint, forays into Rajasthan with daily flights to Udaipur
description: Akasa Air on Thursday announced its entry into Rajasthan with the launch of direct flight operations to Udaipur. Effective October 15, 2026, the airline will commence daily non-stop flights connecting Udaipur with two major metropolitan hubs: Mumbai and Bengaluru.
content: New Delhi [India], June 25 (ANI): In a bid to strengthen its domestic network, Akasa Air on Thursday announced its entry into Rajasthan with the launch of direct flight operations to Udaipur. Effective October 15, 2026, the airline will commence dail... [1880 chars]

title: DGCA says probing Air India, IndiGo planes incident at Ahmedabad airport
description: An investigation is underway by aviation authorities following a mishap at Ahmedabad airport involving an Air India aircraft that mistakenly entered the same taxiway as an IndiGo flight. The Air India plane, arriving from Mumbai, made a wrong turn while taxiing, causing both planes to pause on taxiway 'P'.
content:
